key.name: show-lunar-in-panel
key.description: Whether to show the lunar date next to the clock in the top panel.

key.name: show-festivals-in-panel
key.description: Whether to show festival information next to the clock in the top panel.

key.name: show-statutory-holidays
key.description: Whether to show statutory holiday markers (rest/work) in the calendar.

key.name: holiday-data-url
key.description: URL to fetch statutory holiday data from.

key.name: holiday-data-cache
key.description: Cached JSON data of statutory holidays.

key.name: holiday-data-last-update
key.description: ISO date string of when holiday data was last updated.
